title: Jumbo 6.5 inch XL Carabiner Key Chain  Outdoor Rec - Red
description:
These carabiners are constructed of durable aluminum and come with a key ring for easy attachment to just about anything. Attach one to your backpack, water bottle, keys or purse to keep things handy and organized. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep around the house, your office or outdoor gear! They are ideal for camping and outdoor recreation. Please note: these carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING.
